text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sorry. My head muscles are a little sore...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's a throbbing kind of pain, like when you
overuse a muscle that's out of shape.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I dunno why. Is it because I've been studying more
than usual for my tests?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Or... is it because I keep thinking about what's
gonna happen next in the manga I've been
reading?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ow... Even talking too loud hurts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Ryan is struggling with a
migraine.
